single_choice.stem: When I go out in the daytime I use the bike _____ the car if I can.
single_choice.analysis:
【翻译】白天出行时，我尽可能地骑自行车而不开车。
［考点］词义辨析
【精析】A rather than：而不是；regardless of：不管，不顾；in spite of：尽管；more than:比……多。根据句意，选A。
single_choice.title: 单选题

single_choice.stem: Mary likes classical music _____ her brother likes pop music.
single_choice.analysis:
【翻译】玛丽喜欢古典音乐而她哥哥喜欢流行音乐。
［考点］固定用法
【精析】C选项中只有while（而）表示前后两种情况的对比，其他选项无此用法。
single_choice.title: 单选题

single_choice.stem:
—Shall we invite Tim?
—No，  it’s too late to invite any more people. _____，  he hates parties，  you know.
single_choice.analysis:
【翻译】——我们邀请蒂姆吗？
——不了，再邀请任何人都已经太晚了。而且，你也知道，他讨厌聚会。
［考点］词义辨析
【精析】C except:除了；beside:在……旁边；besides:另外，而且；but:但是。根据句意，选C。
single_choice.title: 单选题

single_choice.stem: You may keep the car _____ you need it.
single_choice.analysis:
【翻译】只要你需要你就可以使用这辆车。［考点］状语从句
【精析】C选项中只有as long as可以引导条件状语从句，意为“只要”。as far as意为“直到……，远到……，在……的范围内”；as good as和as weel as均表示“与……一样好”。
single_choice.metas:
{"choices":["

as far as<\/p>","

as good as<\/p>","

as long as<\/p>","

as well as<\/p>"]}
single_choice.title: 单选题

single_choice.stem: I can’t find the key to the door. I _____ have lost it on my way home.
single_choice.analysis:
【翻译】我找不到门钥匙了。我一定是把它丢在回家的路上了。
［考点］情态动词
【精析】C would have done表示对过去事情的假设，意为“本来会做”；should/ought to have done表示本应该做某事而实际上没有做；must have done表示对过去事情的肯定推测，意为“一定做过某事”。根据句意，选C。
single_choice.title: 单选题

single_choice.stem: If you _____ your children well，  you will be proud of them.
single_choice.analysis:
【翻译】如果你把孩子们培养得很好，你将为他们感到骄傲。
［考点］词义辨析
【精析】B catch up:赶上；bring up：抚养，培养，教养；take up：占用……，开始从事；grow up:长大成人，兴起并发展起来。根据句意，选B。
single_choice.title: 单选题

single_choice.stem: Your e-mail is well written _____ some spelling mistakes.
single_choice.analysis:
【翻译】除了一些拼写错误，你的电子邮件写得很好。
［考点］词义辨析
【精析】C let alone：更不用说：besides：除了……还……，均不符合句意。其实本句主要考查的是except和except for的用法区别。except作“除……以外”解，强调从整体中除去一部分，多指对同类事物的排除。而except for作“除了……，只……”解，强调从整体中排除一部分，对主语的内容在细节方面进行修正。综上所述，本题应选C。
single_choice.title: 单选题

single_choice.stem: It is not always reliable to make a conclusion on the _____ of the first impression.
single_choice.analysis:
【翻译】基于第一印象下结论并不总是可靠的。
［考点］词语搭配
【精析】Don the basis of为固定搭配，意为“以……为基础，根据，按照”。
single_choice.title: 单选题

single_choice.stem:
—Tell me something about your adventure last year.
—We lost our way in the forest and _____ made matters worse was _____ it began to rain.
single_choice.analysis:
【翻译】——请告诉我一些你们去年旅行的事吧。
——我们在森林里迷了路，情况更糟的是天也开始下雨了。
［考点］名词性从句
【精析】A分析句子结构可知，第一个空白处应填入一个能引导主语从句且在从句中作主语的连接词，故what符合要求。第二个空白位于was后，所以应是一个表语从句，又因从句中各种成分齐全，故应由that来引导。综上所述，本题选A。
single_choice.title: 单选题

single_choice.stem: They didn’t go home _____ they had finished the task.
single_choice.analysis:
【翻译】直到完成了任务，他们才回家。

［考点］状语从句

【精析】D本题考查状语从句的引导词。虽然A、B、C、D四个选项均可引导状语从句，但用法不同。since和because常引导原因状语从句，意为“因为，由于”；同时，since还可以引导时间状语从句，意为“自从”；unless常引导条件状语从句，意为“除非，若不”；until也可引导时间状语从句，且常在句中构成not…until…结构，意为“直到……才……”。根据句意，选D。
single_choice.title: 单选题

single_choice.stem: The authority urged the rebellious party to _____ their arms and come back to the negotiating table.
single_choice.analysis:
【翻译】当权者强烈要求反抗者放下武器，重新回到谈判桌前。
［考点］词义辨析
【精析】D lay over:（中途）稍作停留，使延期；lay off：解雇（雇员）；lay out：展开，铺开，布置；lay down：放下，制定。根据句意，选D。
single_choice.title: 单选题

single_choice.stem: The traffic was very heavy，  otherwise I _____ here 30 minutes ago.
single_choice.analysis:
【翻译】交通拥堵严重，否则我三十分钟前就到这儿了。
［考点］虚拟语气
【精析】C虚拟条件句有时不直接表示出来，而是暗含在句子中。本句中otherwise就相当于一个虚拟条件从句，等同于if the traffic had not been very heavy,所以其后的主句应用would have done的形式,表示“本可以做到……”，而不用其他形式。
single_choice.title: 单选题

single_choice.stem: There seemed to be no _____ to their financial problems.
single_choice.analysis:
【翻译】看似没有解决他们财政问题的办法。
［考点］词语搭配
【精析】D method:方法，方式，一般与of搭配；function:功能，作用，一般与of搭配；decision：决定，抉择，一般与介词on, about搭配；solution：解决办法，一般与介词to搭配。故本题选D。
single_choice.title: 单选题

single_choice.stem: The Blacks are _____ people in the little town.
single_choice.analysis:
【翻译】布莱克一家人是这个小镇上最有钱的人。
［考点］形容词最高级
【精析】D by far 和much都可以修饰形容词的最高级，且均应置于最高级前的定冠词之前。故本题选D。
single_choice.metas:
{"choices":["

possible the richest<\/p>","

the much richest<\/p>","

the richest by far<\/p>","

by far the richest<\/p>"]}
single_choice.title: 单选题

single_choice.stem: The manager often requires us never to _____ till tomorrow what we can do today.
single_choice.analysis:
【翻译】经理经常要求我们永远不要把今天能做的事推迟到明天。
［考点］词义辨析
【精析】B come up：走近，引起注意；put off：推迟，使延期；turn on：打开（开关）；give out:分发。根据句意，选B。
single_choice.title: 单选题

single_choice.stem: Surprisingly，  the accident did very little _____ to either of the cars.
single_choice.analysis:
【翻译】出乎意料的是，这次事故几乎没有对两辆汽车造成任何损坏。
［考点］词义辨析
【精析】A damage:损害，损失，破坏；danger：危险；effect：结果，影响；confusion：混乱，紊乱。根据句意，选A。
single_choice.title: 单选题

single_choice.stem: John found _____ difficult to pass the entrance examination.
single_choice.analysis:
【翻译】约翰发现通过入学考试很难。
［考点］It的用法/非谓语动词
【精析】A当复合宾语中的宾语是由动词不定式、动词ing形式短语或宾语从句充当时，往往把宾语放在它的补足语后面，而用it来充当形式宾语。故本题选A。
single_choice.title: 单选题

single_choice.stem: When he awoke，  he found himself _____ after by an old woman.
single_choice.analysis:
【翻译】当他醒来时，他发现他正被一个老妇人照顾着。
［考点］非谓语动词
【精析】D在感官动词find, feel, hear, listen to等词后应跟动词的ing形式作宾语补足语，表示事件正在发生；用被动形式表示宾语和动词之间为动宾关系。
single_choice.title: 单选题

single_choice.stem: He set off one hour earlier to _____ he could catch the 12 o’clock train.
single_choice.analysis:
【翻译】他早出发了一个小时以确保能赶上12点的火车。
［考点］词义辨析
【精析】C believe:相信；find：发现，找到；make sure：确保（某事发生），后可跟从句；look：查看，看，瞧。根据句意，选C。
single_choice.title: 单选题

single_choice.stem: Every man，  woman and child _____ love and understanding.
single_choice.analysis:
【翻译】每一个男人、女人和孩子都需要爱和理解。
［考点］主谓一致
【精析】D every相当于“每一个”，在every…and (every)…结构之后，谓语动词用单数。
single_choice.title: 单选题

single_choice.stem: Although _____ ten years ago，  the machine is still in good condition.
single_choice.analysis:
【翻译】虽然这台机器是十年前制造的，但它各方面状况都不错。
［考点］省略句
【精析】C在although引导的从句中，当谓语中含有系动词be,并且主语又与主句主语一致时，主语和be可以省略。Although made ten years ago…的完整形式是Although the machine was made ten years ago…。
single_choice.title: 单选题

single_choice.stem: His application for the position was _____ by the employer because of his qualifications.
single_choice.analysis:
【翻译】他对这个职位的申请由于他的资格问题而被雇主拒绝了。
［考点］词义辨析
【精析】C turn out:关上，关掉（电灯等）；turn on:打开（开关）；turn down：关小，拒绝；turn up:发现，找到（某物）。根据句意，选C。
single_choice.title: 单选题

single_choice.stem: There was nothing we could do _____ wait at that moment.
single_choice.analysis:
【翻译】那时我们除了等待，什么都做不了。
［考点］词义辨析
【精析】A在介词but, except, besides后跟不定式作宾语时，如果介词前有do及其变化形式，则不定式可省略to。选项中A、D均符合此用法，但but意为“除了……”，besides意为“除了……还……”。根据句意，选A。
single_choice.title: 单选题

single_choice.stem: Whenever we planned our vacations， mother could always offer some _____ suggestions.
single_choice.analysis:
【翻译】每当我们规划假期的时候，母亲总能为我们提供一些实用的建议。
［考点］词义辨析
【精析】B careful：小心的，细心的；practical:实际的，实用的；effective:产生预期结果的，有效的；efficient：效率高的。根据句意，选B。
single_choice.title: 单选题

single_choice.stem: Mum，  I’ve been studying English since 8 o’clock. _____ I go out and play with Tom for a while?
single_choice.analysis:
【翻译】妈妈，我从8点开始就一直在学英语。我难道就不能出去和汤姆玩一下吗？
［考点］情态动词
【精析】A can表示推测，意为“可能，能够”时，往往用于否定句或疑问句。B项有虚拟语气的意味；C、D选项也不符合句意与时态。
single_choice.title: 单选题

single_choice.stem: The old-fashioned chair in the living room has been _____ from my great grandmother.
single_choice.analysis:
【翻译】客厅里那把老式的椅子是由我的曾祖母传下来的。
［考点］词义辨析
【精析】B hand over:把（权力或责任）移交给……；hand down：把某事物传下去，传给（后代）；hand out：分发；hand in：提交，呈交，上交。根据句意，选B。
single_choice.title: 单选题

single_choice.stem: You’ve never told me why you didn’t come to my birthday party，  _____?
single_choice.analysis:
【翻译】你从未告诉我你为何没来参加我的生日宴会，不是吗？
［考点］反意疑问句
【精析】B当陈述部分中主句的主语不是第一人称I时，附加疑问部分的主语和谓语应与主句中的主语和谓语保持一致，又因主句中出现了否定词never,所以此处应用肯定结构have you。
single_choice.title: 单选题

single_choice.stem: Having heard so much about Mr.  Smith，  they were _____ to meet him.
single_choice.analysis:
【翻译】他们在听说了许多关于史密斯先生的事后，非常渴望见到他。
［考点］词义辨析
【精析】A eager:热切的，渴望的，be eager to do sth.意为“急切盼望做某事”；nice：和善的，友好的；urgent：紧急的，紧迫的；earnest：认真的，一本正经的。根据句意，选A。
single_choice.title: 单选题

single_choice.stem: At the sight of her long-lost friend，  she could hardly _____ her tears.
single_choice.analysis:
【翻译】一看见她久未谋面的朋友，她几乎不能抑制自己的眼泪。
［考点］词义辨析
【精析】C give in:投降，让步；turn back:往回走，扭转；hold back:抑制（感情、眼泪等）；keep away from:离开，避开。根据句意，选C。
single_choice.title: 单选题

single_choice.stem: The travelers _____ 300 miles a day by car when they were in Africa.
single_choice.analysis:
【翻译】旅行者在非洲时乘车一天走了300英里。
［考点］词义辨析
【精析】C pass:穿过，路过；take：拿住，做（某事）；cover：走（一段距离）；bring：把……移至……。根据句意，选C。
single_choice.title: 单选题

single_choice.stem: We should do as much as we can _____ our country better and more beautiful.
single_choice.analysis:
【翻译】我们应该尽量多做些事情来使我们的国家变得更好、更漂亮。
［考点］非谓语动词
【精析】B不定式可以作目的状语，且一般放在句子尾部。其他三个选项均没有这种用法。
single_choice.title: 单选题

single_choice.stem: It was the driver’s carelessness that _____ the traffic accident.
single_choice.analysis:
【翻译】正是驾驶员的粗心才导致了这起交通事故。
［考点］词义辨析
【精析】C result不与介词at，with搭配；result in意为“造成，导致”；result from意为“因……发生，由……造成”。根据句意，选C。
single_choice.title: 单选题

single_choice.stem: She finally decided to obtain a _____ from the bank in order to buy a house.
single_choice.analysis:
【翻译】她最终决定从银行贷款来买房。
［考点］词义辨析
【精析】C finance:财政，资金；capital：资本，资金；loan：贷款；profit：利润，赢利。根据句意，选C。
single_choice.title: 单选题

single_choice.stem: Ten minutes _____ an hour when one is expecting a phone call.
single_choice.analysis:
【翻译】当一个人正在等电话时，十分钟就像一个小时那样漫长。
［考点］主谓一致
【精析】A本句描述的是一种心理状态，故应用一般现在时态；又因当时间、距离、金钱等的复数名词作主语时，通常看作一个整体，谓语动词应用单数形式，故本题应选A。
single_choice.title: 单选题

single_choice.stem: All the traveling _____ are to be paid by the company if you travel on business.
single_choice.analysis:
【翻译】如果你是因公出差，所有的差旅费都将由公司来支付。
［考点］词义辨析
【精析】D charges:费用；money：货币，钱；price：价格，价钱；expenses:开支，经费，一般指为某种目的而用的或需要的费用。本句中traveling expenses意为“差旅费”。
single_choice.title: 单选题

single_choice.stem: It suddenly occurred to me that we could _____ the police for help.
single_choice.analysis:
【翻译】我忽然想起来我们可以向警察寻求帮助。
［考点］词义辨析
【精析】A ask:询问，ask sb. for sth.意为“向某人要某物”;look：查看，看，瞧；tell：告诉，讲述；meet：遇见，相见。根据句意，选A。
single_choice.title: 单选题

single_choice.stem: _____ the flood，  the ship would have reached the destination on time.
single_choice.analysis:
【翻译】要不是洪水，船早就按时到达目的地了。
［考点］虚拟语气
【精析】C本句是一个暗含虚拟语气的条件句，表示与过去事实相反。选项中只有but for可以表示非真实条件，意为“要不是，倘若没有”。本句中But for the flood等同于If it had not been for the flood。
single_choice.metas:
{"choices":["

In case of<\/p>","

Because of<\/p>","

But for<\/p>","

In spite of<\/p>"]}
single_choice.title: 单选题

single_choice.stem: The police are _____ the traffic accident that happened yesterday.
single_choice.analysis:
【翻译】警察正在调查昨天发生的那起交通事故。
［考点］词义辨析
【精析】C look down upon:轻视，看不起；look forward to:期望，等待；look into：调查，研究；look after：照顾，照料。根据句意，选C。
single_choice.metas:
{"choices":["

looking down upon<\/p>","

looking forward to<\/p>","

looking into<\/p>","

looking after<\/p>"]}
single_choice.title: 单选题

single_choice.stem: _____ more time，  he’ll make a first-class tennis player sooner or later.
single_choice.analysis:
【翻译】假以时日，他迟早会成为一名一流的网球运动员。
［考点］非谓语动词
【精析】C give与he之间是逻辑上的动宾关系，因此此处应用过去分词形式作状语，表被动，相当于一个条件状语从句if he is given more time。
single_choice.title: 单选题

single_choice.stem: We don’t doubt _____ he can do a good job，  concerning his experience.
single_choice.analysis:
【翻译】考虑到他的经验，我们相信他能做好这份工作。
［考点］名词性从句
【精析】B动词doubt表示“怀疑，不能肯定”时，其否定式后的宾语从句应用that来引导。故本题选B。
single_choice.title: 单选题

yuedulijie.stem:
Since we are social beings，  the quality of our lives depends in large measure on our interpersonal relationships. One strength of human condition is our possibility to give and receive support from one another under stressful(有压力的)conditions. Social support makes up the exchanges of resources among people based on their interpersonal ties. Those of us with strong support systems appear better able to deal with major life changes and daily problems. People with strong social ties live longer and have better health than those without such ties. Studies over types of illnesses, from depression to heart disease，  show that the presence of social support helps people defend themselves against illness，  and the absence of such support makes poor health more likely.
    Social support cushions stress in a number of ways. First，  friends，  relatives and coworkers may let us know that they value us. Our self-respect is strengthened when we feel accepted by others in spite of our faults and difficulties. Second，  other people often provide us with informational support. They help us to define and understand our problems and find solutions to them. Third，  we typically find social companionship supportive.(83)Taking part  in free-time activities with others helps us to meet our social needs while at the same time distracting us from our worries and troubles. Finally，  other people may give us instrumental support—money aid，  material resources，  and needed services—that reduces stress by helping us resolve and deal with our problems.
yuedulijie.title: 阅读理解

items.analysis:
［考点］主旨大意题    
【精析】D作者在文章开头便指出作为社会人，我们的生活质量在很大程度上取决于我们的人际关系，接下来又指出好的人际关系会带来的种种好处，并于第二段着重讲解了社会关怀可以从多方面缓解压力。所以本文作者主要谈论的是人际关系的重要性。
items.metas:
{"choices":["

how to improve our interpersonal relationships<\/p>","

people\u2019s health conditions<\/p>","

how to deal with daily worries and problems<\/p>","

the importance of interpersonal relationships<\/p>"]}
choices: how to deal with daily worries and problems

items.analysis:
［考点］主旨大意题    
【精析】A通读第二段会发现，本段采用的是总—分的写作结构，所以第一句话的内容就是本段的主旨。通过后面内容也可知选项中只有A项与此照应。故选A。

{"choices":["

ways to reduce stress<\/p>","

informational support<\/p>","

instrumental support<\/p>","

social companionship<\/p>"]}

increase the effect of<\/p>","

a rug placed on the floor<\/p>"]}

items.stem: Lending money to a person in trouble belongs to _____.
items.analysis:
［考点］事实细节题    
【精析】C从文章第二段最后一句话“…other people may give us instrumental support—money aid, material resources, and needed services…”可知，钱财救助、物质资源和所需服务都属于物质性支持。故本题选C。

{"choices":["

the strengthening of self-respect<\/p>","

social companionship<\/p>","

instrumental support<\/p>","

informational support<\/p>"]}

items.stem: According to the passage，  which of the following is true?
items.analysis:
［考点］事实细节题    
【精析】D由文章第一段最后一句的调查内容可知，好的社会关系可以帮助人们抵御疾病，而社会关系的缺失很可能会造成人们的身体状况欠佳。故D项说法是正确的。A项中playing chess是“social companionship support”；B,C项说法太过绝对。
items.metas:
{"choices":["

Playing chess with others in spare time is of informational support.<\/p>","

Social support enables us to succeed in dealing with all kinds of problems.<\/p>","

With social support\uff0c  people will become perfect without any faults.<\/p>","

It\u2019s possible that people who have fewer social ties are in poor health.<\/p>"]}
choices: Playing chess with others in spare time is of informational support.
Social support enables us to succeed in dealing with all kinds of problems.
With social support，  people will become perfect without any faults.
It’s possible that people who have fewer social ties are in poor health.

yuedulijie.stem:
Airline companies are responsible for transporting your luggage. If you cannot recover it at the point of arrival，  you must inform the airline immediately. They will carry out the necessary search. If the luggage is recovered，  it will be delivered to your place of residence. If you wish to insure your luggage，  you may do so at your own expense.
    Some airlines restrict luggage weight to 44 pounds(20kg); in other cases，  there is no weight restriction，  but you are not allowed more than two pieces of luggage.Inquire about luggage allowances from the airline with which you will be traveling. However，  you must pay extra for excess luggage， which is not reimbursed(补偿) by Canadian International Development Agency(CIDA).
    Each suitcase，  bag or package must be clearly labeled with your name and destination. (82)If you do not know the exact destination address at the time of your departure，  label your luggage in care of(由……代收) the executing agency whose name appears in the Training Agreement，  using the following model:
Surname，  first name
Name of your country
Address of the executing agency
City，  country，  postal code
Telephone number of executing agency
If you do not have this information，  please label your luggage with the name and address of the institution you are to attend in CanadIf none of these details are available，  you can use CIDA’s address.
yuedulijie.title: 阅读理解

items.stem: If you can’t find your luggage at the point of arrival，  airline companies will try to find it and _____.
items.analysis:
［考点］事实细节题
【精析】B由文章第一段第四句“If the luggage is recovered, it will be delivered to your place of residence.”可知，行李一旦被找到会被送往“你”的住处。故选B。
items.metas:
{"choices":["

ask you to insure your luggage<\\/p>","

deliver it where you live<\\/p>","

inform you about its recovery<\\/p>","

ask you to pay some money for it<\\/p>"]}
choices: ask you to pay some money for it
items.title: 单选题

items.stem: Before taking your air trip，  you have to make sure _____.
items.analysis: 本题考细节。答案在文章第二段第二句。“luggage allowances”相当于答案中的“restrictions on luggage”，可知答案为A。
items.metas:
{"choices":["

of the restrictions on luggage<\\/p>","

of the insurance for luggage<\\/p>","

who will pay for the excess luggage<\\/p>","

how much CIDA will pay for the excess luggage<\\/p>"]}
choices: who will pay for the excess luggage
how much CIDA will pay for the excess luggage
items.title: 单选题

items.stem: The charge for the excess luggage should be paid by _____.
items.analysis: 本题考细节。答案在文章第二段第三句。文中的“you”代表的就是答案中的“passenger”，可知答案为B。
items.title: 单选题

items.stem: In case you have no idea at all where to send your luggage，  you can send it to the address of _____provided you have the information.
items.analysis: 本题考细节。答案在文章第三段第二句，可知答案为D。
items.metas:
{"choices":["

the institution you are to attend<\\/p>","

the airline you travel with<\\/p>","

the Canadian International Development Agency<\\/p>","

the executive agency given in the Training Agreement<\\/p>"]}
choices: the executive agency given in the Training Agreement
items.title: 单选题

items.stem: The passage is mainly about CIDA’s advice on _____.
items.analysis: 本题考主旨，测试对全文的通篇理解。文章第一句就提到了“Airline companies are responsible for transporting your luggage”。后面解释如何负责，第二段介绍了“luggage restriction”．第三段介绍了如何填写“destination address”。整体来看，文章都在讲托运行李中的一系列问题，故答案为D。
items.metas:
{"choices":["

the charge of your luggage<\\/p>","

the handling of your luggage<\\/p>","

the insurance of your luggage<\\/p>","

the transportation of your luggage<\\/p>"]}
items.title: 单选题

yuedulijie.stem:
(84)One of the best known proverbs must be “Early to bed，  early to rise，  makes a man healthy，  wealthy and wise”. The promises of health， wealth and wisdom to those who join the ranks of the early retires and risers must be particularly appealing to many people in our contemporary society. There is no doubt that one of the greatest concerns of modern man is his health. It is  estimated that in the United States 200 billion dollars are spent on health care each year. The medical field has grown into such a big business that it employs 4.8 million people and it appears that in many places， more staff is needed to meet the  demands of the people who are concerned about their physical well being.
    Much more interest has been shown in preventive(预防的)medicine in recent years.(85) This is probably due in part to the increasing costs of medical treatment， but the writings of such people as Dr. Kenneth Cooper have also played an important role. In his book Aerobics，  Dr.Cooper communicated his message of the benefits of exercise so effectively that many other authors have followed in his trail， and literally millions of readers have put on their sports shoes and taken to the highways and byways of AmericA recent survey showed that over one million people are jogging. The last time I was in Honolulu， I was amazed to see hundreds of people， young and old， running for their lives， and I discovered many of them had run in the Hawaiian Marathon.
    Exercise has also become a major part of conversation. At a dinner party recently， the president of a bank asked me， “You look like a runner： how far do you run each day?” A few days later when I appeared on a national television show， the host suddenly asked me if I was a regular runner. On both occasions the conversation turned to the subject of exercise and I found， as I have found wherever I have traveled recently， that this is a subject on many people’s minds. Of course， there are still many people who are less enthusiastic about exercise. They appreciate the philosophy of Robert M.Hutchins who said， “Whenever the thought of exercise occurs to me， I lie down till it passes.”
yuedulijie.title: 阅读理解

items.stem: The underlined word “retires” in Par1 probably refers to _____.
items.analysis:
［考点］词语理解题    
【精析】A分析文章第一段前两句可知，第二句中的“the early retires and risers”分别对应第一句中的“Early to bed, early to rise”，所以此处retires指的应是“去睡觉，就寝”。故本题选A。
items.metas:
{"choices":["

people who go to bed<\/p>","

people who live in quiet places<\/p>","

people who have a lot of free time<\/p>","

people who give up their work<\/p>"]}
choices: people who have a lot of free time
items.title: 单选题

items.stem: The first paragraph indicates that medical workers _____.
items.analysis:
［考点］推理判断题    
【精析】D由文章第一段最后一句的描述可知，现在已有480万人从事医疗职业，但对于满足关注自己身体健康的人的需求来说，还需要更多的人。所以，本段表明医务人员极其缺乏。
items.metas:
{"choices":["

can make a lot of money<\/p>","

like running sports more than ordinary people<\/p>","

are more concerned with their own health<\/p>","

are in great demand<\/p>"]}
choices: like running sports more than ordinary people
are more concerned with their own health
items.title: 单选题

items.stem: In the United States， medical treatment is _____.
items.analysis:
［考点］推理判断题    
【精析】A由文章第一段第四句和第二段第二句可知，美国每年在医疗保健上的花费是2000亿美元，而且医疗费用还在不断增加。由此可推知美国的医疗费用是高昂的。
items.title: 单选题

items.stem: The pronoun “it” in the last sentence of the passage means _____.
items.analysis:
［考点］词语理解题    
【精析】B由文章中it所在的句子意思“当我产生想运动的想法时，我总是躺下直到这个念头消失”可知，it指代的是“运动的想法”。故选B。
items.title: 单选题

items.stem: The examples of conversation in the last paragraph are used _____.
items.analysis:
［考点］推理判断题    
【精析】C作者在最后一段第一句便指出运动已成为人们谈话的主要部分，接下来又用两个亲身经历的例子，得出结论：运动这个话题存在于许多人的脑海中。由此我们可以推知，许多人都对运动感兴趣。故选C。
items.metas:
{"choices":["

to show the writer\u2019s love for travel<\/p>","

to prove that the writer was a good runner<\/p>","

to show people\u2019s interest in exercise<\/p>","

to prove that people are tired of old conversation topics<\/p>"]}
choices: to show the writer’s love for travel
to prove that the writer was a good runner
to prove that people are tired of old conversation topics
items.title: 单选题

yuedulijie.stem:
When young people get their first real jobs，  they face a lot of new，  confusing situations.They may find that everything is different from the way things were at school. It is also possible that they will feel uncomfortable and insecure in both professional and social situations.  Eventually， they realize that  university classes can’t  be the only preparation for all of the different situations that arise in the working world.
    (81)Perhaps the best way to learn how to behave in the working world is to identify a worker you admire and observe his behavior. By doing so，  you will be able to see what it is that you admire in this person. For example，  you will observe how he acts in a crisis. Perhaps even more important， you will be able to see what his approach to day-to-day situations is.
    While you are observing your colleague，  you should be asking yourself whether his behavior is like yours and how you can learn from his responses to a variety of situations.By watching and learning from a model，  you will probably begin to identify and adopt good working habits.
yuedulijie.title: 阅读理解

items.stem: The young people who just graduated from school may not behave well in the working world because _____.
items.analysis:
［考点］事实细节题
【精析】B本文第一段前几句作者就描述了刚毕业的年轻人会在工作中感到迷茫、不适应等，接着又在最后一句“Eventually, they realize that university classes can’t be the only preparation for all of the different situations…”给出了出现这种情况的原因，即大学课程不能作为工作中各种情况的唯一准备。选项中只有B项是对本句的完整诠释。
items.metas:
{"choices":["

they were not well educated at school<\/p>","

what they learn in university classes is not adequate for their new life<\/p>","

the society is too complicated to adapt to<\/p>","

they failed to work hard at school<\/p>"]}
choices: they were not well educated at school
what they learn in university classes is not adequate for their new life
the society is too complicated to adapt to
they failed to work hard at school
items.title: 单选题

items.analysis:
［考点］词语理解题
【精析】A分析arise所在的语境可知，that从句是修饰先行词the different situations的定语从句。由此可推出此句意思为“在工作中出现的各种情况”。故arise意为“形成，出现”。故A项正确。
items.metas:
{"choices":["

come into being<\/p>","

bring about<\/p>","

go up<\/p>","

cause to happen<\/p>"]}
items.title: 单选题

items.stem: The best way to learn how to behave in the working world is _____.
items.analysis:
［考点］事实细节题
【精析】B文章第二段第一句“Perhaps the best way to learn how to behave in the working world is to identify a worker you admire and observe his behavior.”指出，学习在工作中如何表现最好的途径是找到一位你敬佩的人，并且观察他的行为。并且由接下来作者举例也可知选项B符合题意。
items.metas:
{"choices":["

to find a worker and follow him closely<\/p>","

to find a person you respect and see how he acts in different situations<\/p>","

to find a person you admire and make friends with him<\/p>","

to make the acquaintance of a model you admire<\/p>"]}
choices: to find a worker and follow him closely
to find a person you respect and see how he acts in different situations
to find a person you admire and make friends with him
to make the acquaintance of a model you admire

items.analysis:
［考点］主旨大意题
【精析】D本文作者从应届毕业生在实际工作中出现的问题入手，着重给出了应对的办法，即文章中提到的最好途径，可以推断这其实是要他们形成好的工作习惯。故D项正确。A,B,C三项均与文义无关。

to offer career guide to young people<\/p>","

to advise young people on good working habits<\/p>"]}

items.analysis:

【精析】C由文章大意及以上题目的分析可知，本文主要讲述了应届毕业生应对新工作的最好办法是寻找一个典范，细心观察并模仿之，C项即是文章中心思想的总体概括。故选C项。

wanxingtiankong.stem:
Shopping for clothes is not the same experience for a man  61  it is for a woman. A man goes shopping because he needs something definitely. His purpose is settled and decided in  62. He knows what he wants， and his  63  is to find it and get it. Almost all men simply walk into a shop and ask the assistant for their needs if they are not in a supermarket. If the shop has them in  64, the deal can be made in less than five minutes， with  65  any chat and to everyone’s satisfaction.
    For a man， slight problems may begin when the shop does not have  66  he wants. In that case， the salesman tries to sell the customer something67—he offers the nearest to the article required.Good salesman brings out such a substitute with 68：“I know this is not the style you want， sir; but would you like to try it for size?It happens to  69 the color you told me.” Few men  70 patience with this kind of treatment， and the usual response is：“This is the right color and maybe the right size， 71  I should be wasting my time and yours by trying it  72.”
    For a woman， buying clothes is always done in the opposite way. She goes  73 when she wants to wander on the streets.  She has never been fully aware what she wants， and she is only “window shopping”. She is always open  74 persuasion， willing to try on  75  number of things. Uppermost in her mind is the thought of finding  76 that everyone thinks suits her. Most women have an excellent sense of value and are always on the look-out for the unexpected 77. Faced with a roomful of  78, a woman may easily spend an hour going from one rail to another before selecting the dresses she wants to try on. 79  is a tiresome process， but apparently an enjoyable one. Most dress shops 80 chairs for the waiting husbands.
wanxingtiankong.title: 完形填空

items.analysis:
［考点］语法结构题    
【精析】D根据引号内前后分句的意思可知，此处仅是一个普通的转折，表示“虽然颜色是我想要的，大小也可能合适，但是试穿它可能是在浪费你我的时间”。选项中although（虽然）常引导让步状语从句，why（为什么）一般引导定语从句，when(什么时候）一般引导时间状语从句，均不符合此句用法。故选D项but（但是）。
items.title: 单选题

items.analysis:
［考点］语法结构题    
【精析】B分析句子结构可知，本句缺少谓语动词，排除C、D选项；全文均采用一般时态讲述，所以此处也应用一般时态have，而不用过去时态had。
items.title: 单选题

items.analysis:
［考点］语法结构题    
【精析】A空白处为名词the color,所以此处构成It happens to be+名词结构，意为“碰巧为某物”。
items.title: 单选题

items.analysis:
［考点］词义辨析题    
【精析】C care:忧虑，当心；concern：担心，担忧；skill：技巧，技能；intention：计划，意图，目的。根据句意“精明的销售员会很有技巧地拿出一件替代品”。故选C。
items.title: 单选题

items.analysis:
［考点］逻辑推理题    
【精析】C根据语境，当商店没有客人要买的东西时，售货员应是尽力去推销和顾客要求之物最接近的其他东西。故此处应选else（其他，另外）。
items.title: 单选题

items.analysis:
［考点］语法结构题    
【精析】D分析句子结构可知，此处需要一个能引导宾语从句，且在从句中充当宾语的引导词，选项中只有what（什么）符合。
items.title: 单选题

items.analysis:
［考点］逻辑推理题    
【精析】B由空白处前半句可知，男人去购物时，不到五分钟就可以搞定。由此可推知，他们和售货员之间的交谈也不多，或者更确切地说，应该是几乎没有。hardly any即可表示此意。故选B。
items.title: 单选题

items.analysis:
［考点］词义辨析题    
【精析】C size:大小，尺寸；color：颜色；stock：库存，储备；style：样式。根据句意“如果商店有现货”，故此处应选C项。
items.title: 单选题

items.analysis:
［考点］词义辨析题    
【精析】A objective:目标，目的；reason：原因；dream：梦，梦想；choice：选择。根据句意，此处表示的是“他知道他想要什么，他的目标就是找到它，买了它”。故选A。
items.title: 单选题

items.analysis:
［考点］词语搭配题    
【精析】B the same一般和as连用，构成the same…as…结构，意为“与……相同，同样”。
items.title: 单选题

items.analysis:
［考点］词义辨析题    
【精析】Bin detail:详细地，具体地；in advance：预先，提前；in一般不直接与hurry搭配使用，in a hurry意为“立即，急切”；in a way：从某种程度上说。根据上下文的意思分析，此处表示的应是“他的目标提前就定好了”。故选B。
items.title: 单选题

items.analysis:
［考点］词语搭配题    
【精析】C try sth. on为固定搭配，意为“试穿（衣物）”。
items.title: 单选题

items.analysis:
［考点］逻辑推理题    
【精析】A本文主要讲述了男人与女人购物时的区别。此处就是一点：男人是带有特定的目的去购物，而女人只是为了在大街上闲逛。此处go shopping为固定用法，意为“购物”。
items.title: 单选题

items.analysis:
［考点］词语搭配题    
【精析】B be open to sth.为固定搭配，意为“愿意接受某物”。
items.title: 单选题

items.analysis:
［考点］逻辑推理题    
【精析】C由本句语境可推知，女人购物时愿意接受别人的劝说，而且也愿意试穿许多衣服。故此处应选C项，构成any number of的搭配，意为“许多”。注意a number of意为“一些，若干”。
items.title: 单选题

items.analysis:
［考点］词义辨析题    
【精析】A something：某物，某种东西；anything：任何事物；nothing：没有任何东西；everything：每件事，事事。根据句意“……想找到每个人都觉得适合她的某物”，故选A。
items.title: 单选题

items.analysis:
［考点］词义辨析题    
【精析】B deal：交易；bargain：便宜货，特价货；surprise：惊喜；thing：事物。根据句意“……总是注意看着意外的特价货”可知，选B。
items.title: 单选题

items.analysis:
［考点］逻辑推理题    
【精析】A根据后半分句“女人在找到她想试穿的衣服之前可能会花费一个小时在各个衣架上”可推知，此处要表达的是“女人面对满屋子的衣服”。故选A。
items.title: 单选题

items.analysis:
［考点］语法结构题    
【精析】C分析句子结构可知，本句是个简单句，缺少主语，故选C项it,指代前文提到的shopping(购物）。
items.title: 单选题

items.analysis:
［考点］词义辨析题    
【精析】D sell：卖；rent：租用；give：给，递交；provide：提供。根据句意“大多数服饰店都为等候的丈夫提供了椅子。”故选D。
items.title: 单选题

fanyi.stem:
(Par2， Passage 3)
Taking part in free time activities with others helps us to meet our social needs while at the same time distracting us from our worries and troubles.
answer: 业余时间跟别人一起参加活动有助于满足我们的社交需求，同时使我们摆脱烦恼和忧愁。
fanyi.title: 翻译题

fanyi.stem:
(Par2， Passage 1)
Perhaps the best way to learn how to behave in the working world is to identify a worker you admire and observe his behavior.
answer: 也许，学习在工作场所如何表现的最好途径，就是找到一位你所钦佩的同事，进而观察其言行。
fanyi.title: 翻译题

fanyi.stem:
(Par1， Passage 4)
One of the best-known proverbs must be “Early to bed， early to rise， makes a man healthy， wealthy and wise”.
answer: 其中最著名的格言之一是“睡得早起得早，富有、聪明、身体好”。
fanyi.title: 翻译题

fanyi.stem:
(Par2， Passage 4)
This is probably due in part to the increasing costs of medical treatment， but the writings of such people as Dr. Kenneth Cooper have also played an important role.
answer: 部分原因可能是医疗费用的日益增长，但是诸如Kenneth Cooper博士等人的著述也起了重要的作用。
fanyi.title: 翻译题

fanyi.stem:
(Par3， Passage 2)
If you do not know the exact destination address at the time of your departure， label your luggage in care of(由……代收) the executing agency whose name appears in the Training Agreement.
answer: 如果你在出发时还不清楚目的地的准确地址，请按照培训协议中所写的执行机构的名称，在你的行李上贴上“由××执行机构代收”的标签。
fanyi.title: 翻译题

xiezuo.stem:
Directions： For this part， you are required to write a composition of 150 to 180 words(英语专业学生).You should base your composition on the title and outline given below.
On Cyberspace Superstars
(1) 近年来出现了许多网络明星；
(2) 分析出现这一现象的原因；
(3) 我的看法。
answer:
On Cyberspace Superstars
Cyberspace is an amazing place where superstars can be made overnight. Just think of Sister Lotus， Brother Sharp， and other famous cyberspace superstars who are known to millions of netizens.
In my opinion， three factors might contribute to the phenomenon. To begin with， with the rapid development of modern technology， Internet is accessible to more and more people. For most people who want to gain overnight fame， they can turn to the network to make their dreams come true. Secondly， the cyberspace is an open place where everyone can upload their pictures， videos and personal comments. Some people’s photos and videos are put by other people and thus gain great popularity. Besides，some Internet promoters may play an important role in the popularity of these stars. They make sensational news to attract high click rates and gain profits.Thirdly，it is undeniable that such cyberspace superstars are different and interesting. Being a follower of them brings a lot of fun.
Frankly speaking，I am not very interested in these so-called cyberspace superstars. I would rather pay more attention to people around me.
xiezuo.title: 写作题
